expectations.evidence: summary.md Problem 1 recommends switching to ListView.builder. The after file implements ListView.builder(itemCount: products.length, itemBuilder: ...) in _ProductList widget.
summary.md Problem 2 discusses adding const modifiers to stateless widgets. The after file uses const extensively: const _SearchBar(), const _ProductList(), const _ProductListItem(), etc.
Each problem includes an Impact section explaining why. Problem 1: all 2000 widgets built at once causing long first render, high memory, and low scroll fps. Code comments also explain rationale.
summary.md additional suggestions item 2: for super large datasets (10000+), suggests pagination with ScrollController to load more on scroll bottom.
summary.md Problem 3: recommends CachedNetworkImage with placeholder and error widget. pubspec.yaml dependency suggestion included: cached_network_image: ^3.3.0.
